text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Osaka Hai is finally here. With her
close friend Daiwa Scarlet also running in the
race, Fine Motion is in high spirits.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, it does seem that she is forcing the
cheerfulness a bit. I tell her she should forget
about everything else while she runs and focus on
enjoying the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion is incapable of putting her status to
one side, however. She approaches the race
sporting her usual smile...
